summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The FT Vest Autocallable Barrier & High Income ETF (ACYQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The FT Vest Autocallable Barrier & High Income ETF (the Fund) seeks to provide investors with a high level of distributions while providing reduced downside risk to equity markets. ACYQ was launched on Jun 23, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands Its Autocallable Barrier & Income ETFs with ACYQ
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust” or “FTA”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched the FT Vest ...
